application.notes:
Applications open Monday 17 August 2026 Applications close Monday 21 September 2026
Offers will be sent Friday 25 September 2026

requirements.notes: In your application, please submit the following photos: •Demi plié in first position, arms in 2nd •Tendu devant efface (open position), arms in 2nd •Tendu à la seconde arms in 2nd •First arabesque, en l’air (facing side) •Fourth croisé on pointe, arms in 5th
poses: Demi plié in first position, arms in 2nd
Tendu devant efface (open position), arms in 2nd
Tendu à la seconde arms in 2nd
First arabesque, en l'air (facing side)
Fourth croisé on pointe, arms in 5th
